decision.summary: Geometry confidence is lower than appearance confidence. Sparse coverage is weak, so the splat may look acceptable while mesh quality remains risky.

evidence_regions.diagnosis: Low camera coverage and narrow baseline. 3DGS may look acceptable from training views, but mesh quality is risky.
evidence_regions.recommendation: 補拍右側與上方俯角，增加 baseline 與遮擋區觀測。
